配置读取: 当系统配置被读取时触发，允许其他模块拦截或修改配置值。
Configuration read: Triggered when the system configuration is read, allowing other modules to intercept or modify configuration values.

配置读取: 在配置写入数据库前触发，允许其他模块验证或修改配置值。
Configuration read: Triggered before configuration is written to the database, allowing other modules to validate or modify configuration values.

配置读取: 在配置成功写入数据库后触发，通知其他模块配置已变更。Server 模块监听此事件以感知配置变化。
Configuration read: Triggered after configuration is successfully written to the database, notifying other modules that the configuration has changed. The Server module listens for this event to detect configuration changes.

Configuration read: Provides system config read and write operations.
